prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `14754a24`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `14754a24`. The rule is: each yellow component is a partial orthogonal plus; when an in-bounds plus contains only `4`/`5`, has at least two `4`s, is not already all `4`, and none of those `4`s has a diagonal extra `4` outside that plus, the plus’s gray `5`s are recolored to red `2`. I discarded the Sonnet rectangle hint and kept the Opus hint only as a partial starting point; the corrected interpretation is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_14754a24/notes.md).

The task package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_14754a24/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_14754a24/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_14754a24/generator.py), and [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_14754a24/helpers.py). No new shared primitive was necessary; task-local helpers were enough. The generator matches the family by using dense `0/5` noise and embedding several well-spaced partial pluses with 2-4 yellow cells each.

Verification completed:
- Official examples: `5/5` passed.
- Generated examples: `1000/1000` passed.
- Visual sanity check: [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/14754a24/previews/preview_01.png) looks on-family.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/14754a24/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/14754a24/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/14754a24/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/14754a24/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/14754a24/previews/preview_03.png).
